# FetchIconOptions.TrustedHosts property

An OPTIONAL allowlist of trusted hosts (§14.2 hardening). When set, an `https:` icon whose host is not on the list is refused before any request is made; `null` (the default) permits any host that passes the scheme and same-origin-redirect rules. Hosts are matched case-sensitively on Host.

```csharp
public IReadOnlySet<string>? TrustedHosts { get; set; }
```
